fields.name: S2_API_KEY
fields.label: Semantic Scholar API Key
fields.description: Get one at https://www.semanticscholar.org/product/api — without it, reference verification is heavily rate-limited.

fields.name: REVIEW_VENUE
fields.label: Target venue
fields.description: Optional: target venue name (e.g. 'OSDI 2027'). Tunes strictness — top-tier systems venues are harsher than workshops.

fields.name: STRICT_CITATION_CHECK
fields.label: Block on any unverified reference
fields.description: If on, every .bib entry must verify against arxiv/Crossref/SS before review submits.

fields.name: MAX_PAPERS_TO_FACT_CHECK
fields.label: Max cited PDFs to fetch for fact-checking
fields.description: Higher = stricter attribution check but slower + more expensive.
